title: Structure Seeker
description: Adds a compass that can locate any structure.
body:
🧭 Structure Seeker 🧭

Turn your compass into the ultimate exploration tool! Structure Seeker lets you track down any major structure in Minecraft using a single item — the Structure Compass. Pay a small diamond fee, insert the right structure token, and watch the needle point the way to adventure.

🔥 How It Works:
Right-click with the Structure Compass to open its interface.
Place a structure token in the first slot, and a diamond in the second slot as payment.
The compass will instantly locate the nearest matching structure and guide you straight to it.

🌍 Overworld Structures:
Use these tokens to find structures across the main world:

🛏️ Red Bed → Village

👁️ Eye of Ender → Stronghold

⚔️ Crossbow → Pillager Outpost

🪄 Totem of Undying → Woodland Mansion

🪨 Echo Shard → Ancient City

🧱 Prismarine Block → Ocean Monument

🚂 Rail → Mineshaft

🪤 Tripwire Hook → Jungle Pyramid

😢 Crying Obsidian → Ruined Portal

🪶 Brush → Trail Ruins

🧪 Cauldron → Swamp Hut

🗝️ Trial Key → Trial Chambers

🔥 Nether Structures:
Brave the heat of the Nether and locate its deadliest strongholds:

🔥 Blaze Rod → Nether Fortress

🪙 Gold Ingot → Bastion Remnant

💫 End Structures:
For those who’ve reached the End and seek the sky’s secrets:

📦 Shulker Shell → End City

✨ Why Use This Mod?
Forget random wandering or typing commands — Structure Seeker makes exploration feel earned, immersive, and survival-friendly. Perfect for adventurers, treasure hunters, and survival players who want a fair way to find rare structures.

📖 Compatibility and Installation:
Works perfectly with existing worlds and modpacks. Just drop it in, grab your compass, and follow the needle to discovery.

🗺️ Adventure awaits — trust the compass, and uncover every secret the world hides.

![crafting recipe for the structure compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/962134a83262c73e227f71f33eeba546d0ad637c.png)
